  1. org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.anthropic
Spring AI integration with Anthropic's Claude models using the official Anthropic Java SDK.
org.springframework.ai.bedrock.converse
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.client
Chat client API.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore
Spring AI chat client advisors package.
org.springframework.ai.chat.evaluation
The org.sf.ai.chat package represents the bounded context for the Chat Model within the AI generative model domain.
org.springframework.ai.chat.model
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.observation
Provides the API for chat observations.
org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt
 
org.springframework.ai.deepseek
 
org.springframework.ai.google.genai
 
org.springframework.ai.google.genai.schema
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai

org.springframework.ai.model.transformer
 
org.springframework.ai.ollama

org.springframework.ai.openai

RAG Sub-Module: Query Augmentation.

RAG Sub-Module: Query Expansion.
org.springframework.ai.rag.preretrieval.query.transformation
RAG Sub-Module: Query Transformation.
org.springframework.ai.rag.util
 
org.springframework.ai.test.options
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt used by org.springframework.ai.anthropic
    Class
    Description
    ChatOptions
    ModelOptions representing the common options that are portable across different chat models.
    ChatOptions.Builder
    Builder for creating ChatOptions instance.
    DefaultChatOptionsBuilder
    Implementation of ChatOptions.Builder to create DefaultChatOptions.
    Prompt
    The Prompt class represents a prompt used in AI model requests.
